user.title: Smart Air Conditioning Controller
user.description: Configure your smart airco system to automatically control air conditioning based on solar energy production.

data_description.solar_forecast_sensor: Sensor that provides solar power forecast (e.g., Solcast)
data_description.solar_production_sensor: Sensor showing current solar panel production
data_description.net_export_sensor: Sensor showing power exported to the grid
data_description.update_interval: How often to check sensors and update decisions

climate_list.title: Climate Entities
climate_list.description: Manage your air conditioning units. You currently have {climate_count} climate entities configured (max {max_climates}).

data_description.action: Choose what you want to do
data_description.climate_id: Select a climate entity to edit or remove

data_description.name: Friendly name for this AC unit
data_description.priority: Lower numbers = higher priority when surplus is limited
data_description.use_estimated_power: Use estimated wattage or real-time power sensor
data_description.wattage: Estimated power consumption when no power sensor is available
data_description.power_sensor: Sensor showing real-time power consumption of this AC unit
data_description.window_sensors: AC won't run when any of these sensors are open
data_description.enabled: Whether this AC should be controlled automatically

error.not_climate_entity: Selected entity is not a climate device
error.already_configured: This climate entity is already configured
error.priority_already_used: This priority number is already in use
error.window_sensor_not_found: One or more window sensors do not exist
error.max_climate_entities_reached: Maximum number of climate entities reached
error.no_climate_entities: You must configure at least one climate entity
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device

init.title: Smart Airco Options
init.description: Choose what you want to configure.

data_description.solar_forecast_sensor: Sensor that provides solar power forecast
data_description.net_export_sensor: Sensor showing power exported to the grid
data_description.update_interval: How often to check sensors and update decisions
